intro: Acronia chavezii, also known as the Acronia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties.
